fundamentals.name: AST SpaceMobile, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: AST SpaceMobile, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, designs and develops the constellation of BlueBird satellites in the United States. The company provides a cellular broadband network in space to be accessible directly by smartphones for commercial use and other applications, as well as for government use. Its SpaceMobile service provides cellular broadband services to end-users who are out of terrestrial cellular coverage. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Midland, Texas.

judgment.summary: Extremely high revenue growth is overshadowed by massive operating losses and a negative profit margin, indicating a pre-revenue business with significant cash burn.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by a wide margin (-0.66 vs -0.17); next earnings date is 2026-08-10.
positives: Revenue growth 1952.2% YoY indicates rapid scaling of operations.
Current ratio 18.47 and quick ratio 17.91 suggest strong short-term liquidity.
Total cash $3.03B provides a substantial runway.
Gross margin 44.8% is healthy for the services provided.
negatives: Operating margin -1014.0% and profit margin 0.0% show extreme unprofitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $-1.41B highlights significant cash burn.
Forward P/E of -435.87 and Price/Sales (TTM) of 591.82 indicate a very high valuation relative to current financials.
Return on equity -37.8% and return on assets -6.3% show poor returns on capital.

news.paragraph: AST SpaceMobile experienced a significant surge, adding $10 billion in market cap following FCC approval and a reset of its BlueBird satellite launch schedule. This positive development coincided with broader gains in space stocks ahead of a SpaceX IPO and a NASA update, with the company's stock jumping as much as 35.9% in a single day. Despite the strong upward momentum, some analysts are flagging red flags amidst the rapid ascent.

headlines.title: AST SpaceMobile Surges 8%; Virgin Galactic, Rocket Lab Ride the SpaceX IPO Wave
